# Tangry Spices

> Tangry is an FSSAI-licensed (12225026001713), ISO 22000-certified manufacturer of authentic spices, masalas, pickles, and condiments handcrafted in Jhotwara, Jaipur, Rajasthan. Founded by Atul Jain. Family recipes, no preservatives, no artificial colours.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.tangryspices.com/): Brand overview, hero products, and featured collections
- [All Products](https://www.tangryspices.com/products): Full product catalogue with pricing and variants
- [About Tangry](https://www.tangryspices.com/about): Founder story, manufacturing process, certifications
- [Contact](https://www.tangryspices.com/contact): Phone, email, address, and business hours
- [Wholesale / B2B](https://www.tangryspices.com/wholesale): Bulk pricing and retailer enquiries
- [Shipping Policy](https://www.tangryspices.com/shipping-policy): Delivery timelines and coverage
- [Track Order](https://www.tangryspices.com/track-order): Real-time order tracking

## Product Categories

- [Spices & Masalas](https://www.tangryspices.com/categories/spices-masalas): Turmeric Powder, Pav Bhaji Masala, Dabeli Masala, Chai Masala, Sambhar Masala
- [Ready to Eat](https://www.tangryspices.com/categories/ready-to-eat): Gun Powder (Podi Masala), Vada Pav Chutney, Peri Peri Masala, Jain Jeeravan Masala, Chaas Masala, Fresh Tomato Ketchup
- [Pickles](https://www.tangryspices.com/categories/pickles): Green Chilli Pickle, Sweet Lemon Pickle, Sweet Mango Relish
- [Essentials](https://www.tangryspices.com/categories/essentials): Turmeric Powder and daily cooking staples

## Best-Selling Products

- [Turmeric Powder](https://www.tangryspices.com/products/turmeric-powder): ₹65–120 (100g/200g) — Bright aromatic haldi for daily Indian cooking
- [Pav Bhaji Masala](https://www.tangryspices.com/products/pav-bhaji-masala): ₹75–255 (50g/100g/200g) — Rich street-style bhaji masala with bold colour
- [Dabeli Masala](https://www.tangryspices.com/products/dabeli-masala): ₹190 (200g) — Tangy, mildly sweet Kutchi dabeli blend
- [Gun Powder / Podi Masala](https://www.tangryspices.com/products/gun-powder-podi-masala): ₹75–240 (50g/100g/200g) — South Indian dry chutney with roasted lentils and curry leaves
- [Vada Pav Chutney](https://www.tangryspices.com/products/vada-pav-chutney): ₹99–199 (100g/200g) — Spicy garlic dry chutney, Mumbai-style

## Brand Facts

- Legal name: Maya Enterprises
- FSSAI License: 12225026001713
- ISO 22000 certified quality management system
- Founded and based in Jaipur, Rajasthan, India
- Phone: +91 7733009952
- Email: tangryspices@gmail.com
- Address: A7, Khatipura Road, Kumawat Colony, Jhotwara, Jaipur 302012
- Hours: Mon–Fri 9 am–6 pm, Sat 10 am–4 pm IST
